homepage.hero.subtitle.message: Replace CMakeLists.txt with clean, readable xmake.lua — full ament integration, rosidl support, and CMake interoperability.

homepage.feature.plugAndPlay.description.message: add_rules("ament_xmake.package") replaces CMakeLists.txt. One rule handles package metadata, ament index, and CMake Config export.

homepage.feature.autoDeps.description.message: add_ros_deps("rclcpp") recursively resolves include directories, compile definitions, and link flags from the ament index.

homepage.feature.rosidl.description.message: Define .msg, .srv, and .action files — the pipeline generates C/C++ code, typesupport libraries, and CMake exports automatically.

homepage.project.colconXmake.message: colcon plugin adding xmake build/test support for ROS 2 packages.

homepage.project.amentXmake.message: ROS 2 ament rule package for xmake-based packages.

homepage.project.examples.message: Example packages and E2E integration tests.
